gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/408)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/408)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ غَسْلُ الرَّأْسِ بِالسِّدْرِ يَجْلِبُ الرِّزْقَ جَلْباً .

en.hubeali: From him, form Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Mansour Bin Buzraj who said,
‘I heard Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘Washing the head with the lotus bring the livelihood with a (strong) bringing’.
en.sarwar: 6. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from Muhammad ibn ’Isma‘il from Mansur ibn Buzurj who has said the following: “I once heard abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying, ‘Washing the head with lotus tree leaves attracts sustenance with a strong attraction.’”
